title: Opinion: Opinion | 'We Protect America, Not Vice Versa': Inside Gulf's Growing Frustration With Trump
summary_full: Kuwaiti analyst Masaed Al-Mannan recently said that the Arab countries are the ones protecting America, not the other way around.  This statement has come to receive widespread Arab support (File Photo)
